summary: Completed testing for hero slideshow carousel feature and admin console responsiveness. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend responsiveness verified on mobile (390px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px).

issues: Minor horizontal overflow: body scroll width 396px on 390px viewport (6px overage)

passed_tests: P0: GET /api/settings/hero returns hero_images array field
P0: GET /api/settings/hero returns hero_rotation_interval field
P0: PUT /api/settings/hero accepts hero_images array
P0: PUT /api/settings/hero accepts hero_rotation_interval
P0: hero_images persists after update (verified via GET)
P0: hero_rotation_interval persists after update (verified via GET)
P0: hero_images accepts empty array
P0: hero_images accepts max 5 images
P0: Combined hero_images and hero_rotation_interval update works
P0: Public GET /api/settings/hero works without auth
P0: PUT /api/settings/hero requires authentication (401 without token)
P0: Admin can update hero settings (200 with admin token)
P0: Response contains all required fields including hero_images and hero_rotation_interval
P0: Rotation interval default value within valid range (2-15 seconds)
P1: Admin dashboard cards stack vertically on mobile (390px)
P1: Hamburger toggle visible on mobile/tablet, hidden on desktop
P1: Sidebar slides open on mobile with hamburger toggle
P1: Admin hero settings page loads correctly on all viewports
P1: Image Slideshow tab visible and functional
P1: Upload grid shows 'Add Image' with 0/5 counter
P1: Rotation interval slider hidden when < 2 images (correct behavior)
P1: Video tab switches correctly with upload area
P1: Live Preview panel shows current hero image
P1: Two-column grid layout on desktop
P1: Sticky preview panel on desktop
P1: Hero section loads without overflow on desktop (1920px)
P1: Hero section loads on mobile (390px)
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero slideshow feature is fully functional. Backend accepts hero_images array (up to 5 URLs) and hero_rotation_interval (2-15 seconds). Frontend shows upload grid with 5-slot limit, rotation slider appears when 2+ images present. Admin dashboard is responsive with hamburger toggle on mobile/tablet. All existing permissions tests still apply (admin@gys.co.id has full access to hero settings).
